reference: All your symptoms indicate that the back muscles need strengthening exercises. Spinal exercises should be learned under the care of physiotherapists. There should be no strenuous efforts; just enough to provide gentle exercises to the muscles of the back. Relaxation from stress is also important, which can be achieved by changing lifestyle, practicing meditation, etc. Hot fomentation is also helpful. Assessment of serum calcium and vitamin D levels is recommended, along with dietary management that includes more fruits, vegetables, and proteins instead of fats.
text: Oriftofishiki at the end of the tunnel. On March 29, 1952, 51-year-old Captain Joseph Pappalardo, a veteran of 26 years in the US Navy, left the United States' Boston Naval Shipyard. Captain Pappalardo had been assigned the USS Polk, a floating 23,000-ton ammunition depot. A second ship, the USS Chemung, a 20,000-ton oil tanker, accompanied the Polk.
